englishDefinitions: To suddenly become unable to think, speak, or act because of fear, stress, or nervousness.
To become stiff, stuck, or blocked, often because of cold or a problem.
persianTranslation: از ترس یا استرس قفل کردن
examples: I always freeze up when I have to speak in public.
The engine froze up in the cold weather.
She froze up during the interview and forgot her answer.
